violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC relocated can opener to 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed and sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Observed medium metal hotel pan of shredded pork, small pan of cooked shrimp, and various containers of sauce (mild, medium and jalapeno) were placed in the refrigerator with temps. ranging from 45 degrees Fahrenheit-50 degrees Fahrenheit). Per interview with PIC above food products were placed in 3 door North American refrigerator Tuesday night after being cooked, cooled and place in refrigerator lukewarm. PIC voluntary disposed of above food products. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Gasket located in the (North American Refrigerator) was not in good repair. Observed gasket on 3rd door of North American Refrigerator hanging halfway off. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
